headline: Raymond James Lifts PT on The Walt Disney Company (DIS) on Q2 Results
summary: The Walt Disney Company (NYSE:DIS) is one of the best communication stocks to invest in. Raymond James lifted the price target on The Walt Disney Company (NYSE:DIS) to $119 from $115 on May 7, reaffirming an Outperform rating on the shares and stating that the company delivered better-than-expected Q2 results and slightly raised FY26 EPS guidance […]
